agents.result_excerpt:
## Status: **done** (Agent 11, `wk52_attachment_phase3_radar_alerts_memorial` / `wk52_r2_perf_qa`)

### Onboarding
Read **AGENTS.md**, **01-studio-onboarding**, **10-orchestrator-logging-contract**, **agent-11-qa-onboarding**, PM hub round **wk52_r2_perf_qa**, and skimmed prior log state. Ran `npm --prefix tools/ai_studio_orchestrator install --silent` (exit **0**).

### WK52 tests
`tests/test_wk52_event_plumbing.py`, `tests/test_wk52_watch_card.py`, and `tests/test_wk52_memorial_card.py` are all present — **no blocker**.

### Gates (exact commands, exit codes)
| Command | Exit |
|---------|------|
| `python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt -q` | **255** would be failure — **0** |
| `python3 -m pytest tests/ -v` | **0** (241 passed, 2 deprecation warnings) |
| `python3 tools/qa_smoke.py --quick` | **0** (`[qa_smoke] DONE: PASS`) |
| `python3 tools/validate_assets.py --report` | **0** (errors=0, warns=46 baseline) |
| `python3 tools/determinism_guard.py` | **0** (`PASS: no violations found`) |

*(Cloud VM has no `python` on PATH; used `python3`.)*

### Screenshots
`python3 tools/capture_screenshots.py --scenario wk52_pin_alerts --seed 3 --out docs/screenshots/wk52_phase3 --size 1920x1080 --ticks 480` → **0** (4 PNGs + `manifest.json`). **`docs/screenshots/` is gitignored**, so PNGs are local evidence only; the log tells PM to re-run that command to reproduce. Visually reviewed: watch card over minimap (expanded/minimized), radar dots, memorial overlay with epitaph.

### Agent log
**Path:** `.cursor/plans/agent_logs/agent_11_QA_TestEngineering_Lead.json`  
**Entry:** `sprints["wk52_attachment_phase3_radar_alerts_memorial"].rounds["wk52_r2_perf_qa"]`  

Includes orchestrator fields (`sprint_id`, `round_id`, `status`, `what_i_changed`, `commands_run`, `evidence`, `blockers`, `follow_ups`) and **`pm_human_retest_request`** with the **16-item checklist verbatim**, as requested. JSON validated with `python3 -m json.tool` (**0**).

### SDK receipt
Ran the given `npx -y tsx tools/ai_studio_orchestrator/src/cli.ts complete ...` with an updated `--summary`; it wrote `tools/ai_studio_orchestrator/runs/inbox/860b0f66-51e8-437b-ab57-6142272e25c2.completion.json` and performed **`--auto-push`**.

### PR
`ManagePullRequest` reported **no diff vs `main`** (remote `main` already contained this line of work after orchestrator pushes). No separate PR was opened.

### Blockers
**None.**

**Follow-up:** Jaimie should run the **`pm_human_retest_request`** list interactively; from repo root (PowerShell-friendly): `python main.py --renderer pygame --provider mock` (or your usual entry), and work through items 1–16 in the log (toasts, Recall flashes, 30s cooldown, memorial pause, etc.).
